links.targetTitle: Swarm manifests form a three-tier hierarchy of user, drive, and document feeds keyed by deterministic keccak256 topics.

global.title: A user manifest indexes drives and a drive manifest lists documents plus folder structure
global.description: User feed ph:v2:user:<address> lists drives; drive feed ph:v2:drive:<driveId> lists documents with parentFolder and a folders map with name and optional parentFolder.
